ddls:
CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "item_desc" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "item_price" TEXT /* Price of the menu item */,
  "item_image" TEXT /* URL to the image of the menu item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the menu item */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the item is available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was last updated */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the menu item (e.g., available, unavailable, seasonal) */,
  "item_ingredients" TEXT /* List of main ingredients of the item */,
  "item_allergens" TEXT /* List of potential allergens in the item */,
  "item_preparation_time" TEXT /* Preparation time for the item */,
  "item_promotion" TEXT /* Details of any promotion associated with the item */,
  "item_special_instructions" TEXT /* Special instructions for preparation or service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Pizza, Burrito, Main Course) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "icon_image" TEXT /* URL to the icon image of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Central, East, West) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager responsible for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, data analyst) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item sold */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the item was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the sale */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order associated with the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., cash, credit card, mobile pay) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sales_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)
